title: Lucky number three for Suzuki Swift winner
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Raymaer Johnny Brandt was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Raymaer Johnny Brandt was the epitome of good things coming in threes when he won a brand-new car in Shell & Spar Express Heiderand's Suzuki Swift Competition.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Raymaer Johnny Brandt was the epitome of good things coming in threes when he won a brand-new car in Shell & Spar Express Heiderand's Suzuki Swift Competition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Since the competition kicked off in March, nine finalists were selected to stand a chance to win their very own Swift."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each finalist won a R1 500 fuel voucher with their selection.","html":"Each finalist won a R1 500 fuel voucher with their selection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Brandt was the third finalist to be announced.","html":"Brandt was the third finalist to be announced."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the day of the draw, when the finalists each had to draw an envelope with a key, he drew number 3, which made him the third person to walk up to the car and test his key.","html":"On the day of the draw, when the finalists each had to draw an envelope with a key, he drew number 3, which made him the third person to walk up to the car and test his key."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He discovered he was the winner!","html":"He discovered he was the winner!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shell & Spar Express Heiderand made sure Brandt wasn't the only one to drive/walk away with a smile.","html":"Shell & Spar Express Heiderand made sure Brandt wasn't the only one to drive/walk away with a smile."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The morning was filled with fuel and Spar voucher giveaways and the MC, Jady Heyns, saw to it that the atmosphere was festive and filled with music to keep the crowd entertained.","html":"The morning was filled with fuel and Spar voucher giveaways and the MC, Jady Heyns, saw to it that the atmosphere was festive and filled with music to keep the crowd entertained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When Brandt finally drove away in his new wheels, he was surrounded by cheers, hooters and pure excitement as those gathered shared in his joy.","html":"When Brandt finally drove away in his new wheels, he was surrounded by cheers, hooters and pure excitement as those gathered shared in his joy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Thank you to everyone who joined us, supported the promotion, and brought the energy. The Heiderand community really showed up!\" said the competition's organisers.","html":"\"Thank you to everyone who joined us, supported the promotion, and brought the energy. The Heiderand community really showed up!\" said the competition's organisers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Lucky number three for Suzuki Swift winner
